name: axon5kotlin-write-slice
description: Axon Framework 5 Kotlin Write Slice Skill — generate Kotlin write slices (Command → decide → Events → evolve → State) from prooph board Event Modeling slices. Covers Spring Boot and Explicit Registration patterns, single-tag and multi-tag DCB, value objects, feature flags, and Given-When-Then tests with AxonTestFixture. Supports migrating AF4 aggregates to AF5.
